name: Omon.phydiazos
title: Surface Mole Concentration of Diazotrophs Expressed as Carbon in Sea Water
description: carbon concentration from the diazotrophic phytoplankton component alone
processing note:
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.phydiazos, you should omit this regional South30 version. 
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time depth0m,
